title: CRM for CPG Company
excerpt:
I’m looking at monday CRM platform as a CPG wholesaler. 
Anyone here using as a CPG CRM who wouldn’t mind taking me through their set-up?

posts.author: Courtenay (Courtenay)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking at monday CRM platform as a CPG wholesaler.
Anyone here using as a CPG CRM who wouldn’t mind taking me through their set-up?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Courtenay!

Charlotte here with the monday team!

While I can’t speak from personal experience like what you’re looking for, I do recommend taking a look at monday spaces where you can find real workflow templates from other companies using monday!

There may be a template or example for you to check out there that is closer to the type of processes you’re looking to set up for your company.

Let us know if you run into any questions!
